case_title: STEVEN L. COHEN VS. JOHN VANDELL et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR JUN-21-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-16-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, STEVEN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANDELL, JOHN $16,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,000.00, PERIODIC PAYMENT UNTIL JUNE 30, 2019. INTEREST ON JUDMGNET STAYED UNTIL 7/1/2010 WHEN UNPAID PORTION OF JUDGMENT WILL BEAR INTEREST AT 10%. SEE JUDGMENT IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMENTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
